'''nazhogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherfoot|featherfoot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherfoot|featherfoot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nazhogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhegeth|næzhegeth]] || [[word:næzhegej|næzhegej]] || [[word:næzhegesh|næzhegesh]] || [[word:næzhege|næzhege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhozhogoth|nazhozhogoth]] || [[word:nazhozhogoj|nazhozhogoj]] || [[word:nazhozhogosh|nazhozhogosh]] || [[word:nazhozhogo|nazhozhogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhogoth|nazhogoth]] || [[word:nazhogoj|nazhogoj]] || [[word:nazhogosh|nazhogosh]] || [[word:nazhogo|nazhogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhofgoth|nazhofgoth]] || [[word:nazhofgoj|nazhofgoj]] || [[word:nazhofgosh|nazhofgosh]] || [[word:nazhofgof|nazhofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhogotho|nazhogotho]] || [[word:nazhogojo|nazhogojo]] || [[word:nazhogosho|nazhogosho]] || [[word:nazhogoko|nazhogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhogoth|nazhogoth]] || [[word:nazhogoj|nazhogoj]] || [[word:nazhogosh|nazhogosh]] || [[word:nazhogo|nazhogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhogothol|nazhogothol]] || [[word:nazhogojol|nazhogojol]] || [[word:nazhogoshol|nazhogoshol]] || [[word:nazhogokol|nazhogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhogothotho|nazhogothotho]] || [[word:nazhogojojo|nazhogojojo]] || [[word:nazhogoshosho|nazhogoshosho]] || [[word:nazhogoko|nazhogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhogothon|nazhogothon]] || [[word:nazhogojon|nazhogojon]] || [[word:nazhogoshon|nazhogoshon]] || [[word:nazhogokon|nazhogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhogothoro|nazhogothoro]] || [[word:nazhogojoro|nazhogojoro]] || [[word:nazhogoshoro|nazhogoshoro]] || [[word:nazhogokoro|nazhogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
